result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "移除 secure_filename 導致路徑穿越攻擊", "issues": [{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "security", "file": "api/routes.py", "line_hint": "L10", "check": "filename 直接來自 request.form，未經過 secure_filename 過濾即拼入路徑", "verdict": "攻擊者可傳入 filename=../../etc/passwd 或 ../../config.py，繞過 UPLOAD_DIR 限制，任意覆寫伺服器檔案（路徑穿越 / Path Traversal）", "fix": "還原 path = os.path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, secure_filename(filename))；若 secure_filename 不可用，至少做 os.path.basename(filename) 並驗證結果路徑以 UPLOAD_DIR 開頭"}]}
